programme.title: Stīvs Bekšols dzelmē ar vaļiem
programme.desc: Stīvs Bekšols atklāj, ka mums ar vaļveidīgajiem ir daudz kopīga. Tāpat kā mēs, vaļi ir zīdītāji. Stīvs nirst viņu zemūdens pasaulē, lai atklātu dziļu gudrību, sarežģītu ģimenes dzīvi un attīstītas saziņas spējas, kas vaļus un delfīnus padara mums tik līdzīgus. Viņš satiek kašalotus, pie kuriem valda matriarhāts, un reti sastopamos pelēkos delfīnus Azoru salās, rotaļīgos plankumainos delfīnus Bahamu salās un "dziedošos" kuprvaļus Klusā okeāna dienvidos. Stīvs atklāj, kā cilvēku viedoklis par vaļiem no bailēm un pārpratumiem ir mainījies uz apbrīnu un atzinību. Nepareizās izpratnes dēļ vaļu medību laikmetā vaļus uzskatīja tikai par preci, un pat mūsdienu pasaulē mēs joprojām viņiem neapzināti kaitējam. Vaļu skaņu pasaule kļūst arvien trokšņaināka. Stīvs uzdod jautājumu, kā atklājumu zelta laikmets var palīdzēt labāk aizsargāt vaļus un delfīnus pasaulē, kas tik strauji mainās.

programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Romā ir nogalināts kāds jauns tūrists no Brazīlijas, kurš kārtojis dokumentus pastāvīgas uzturēšanās atļaujas saņemšanai Itālijā. Pēc viņa nāves nekur nav atrodama viņa draudzene Valentīna. Davides un Rekša veiktās izmeklēšanas pēdas ved kāda noziedzīga grupējuma virzienā. Davides iespaidā Reksim nākas pievērsties veselīgam dzīvesveidam.

programme.title: Aizraujošie vilcienu maršruti
programme.desc: Šajā sērijā Maikls Portillo iepazīs plašo Ukrainu. Kijivā mūsdienu ceļotājs apskatīs Svētās Sofijas katedrāli, uzzinās, kā Ukrainā ieradās pareizticība, un centīsies izprast šībrīža konfliktu ar Krieviju. Ukraiņu tautas identitāti viņam palīdzēs iepazīt gan kazaku nometnē, gan kādā virtuvē Ļvivā, kur ukraiņu saimnieces vadībā Maikls gatavos vareņikus. Savukārt, Odesā ceļotājs izzinās pilsētas vēsturi, kas saistīta gan ar Katrīnu II, gan plašu ebreju kopienu, un sērijas noslēgumā ļausies dziednieciskām ūdens procedūrām pilsētas pievārtē.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Stefans uzzina, ko Briērs rakstījis par 31. iecirkņa "mītisko pāri" - rakstu saorganizējusi Nansija. Siguēns nav priecīgs par šādu notikumu gaitu. Floransa un Noelija turpina izmeklēt nošautā suņa lietu, abu kaimiņu ģimenēs tikmēr noris pamatīga drāma. Niks ieskatās Noelijā.

programme.title: Inspektors Lūiss
programme.desc: Šī ir seriāla pēdējā sezona. Gandrīz dekādi ilgušais seriāls ir iemantojis uzticīgu skatītāju loku. Oksfordšīras policijas iecirknī ierodas jauns vadītājs, kurš ar mūsdienīgo pieeju kontrastē ar Lūisa tradicionālajām darba metodēm. Sekosim līdzi sešām sērijām jeb trīs divdaļīgām kriminālmistērijām ar pārsteidzošiem noziegumu risinājumiem.

programme.title: Midsomeras slepkavības
programme.desc: Detektīvs Toms Bārnabijs ir pacietīgs un metodisks izmeklētājs. Viņš saprot, ka noziegumiem mazā pilsētiņā vienmēr būs sociāls raksturs, tamdēļ svarīgi izprast tās iedzīvotāju attiecības. Tikai un vienīgi viņš spēj pamanīt neskaidrus mājienus un sadzīt pēdas viltīgam slepkavam brīdī, kad nupat, šķiet, tas izbēgs nesodīts. Kad Toms Bārnabijs atgriežas mājās, viņš ir mīlošs vīrs un tēvs, tomēr, neskatoties uz to, detektīvs viņā nekad nesnauž. Citreiz vistrāpīgākās atklāsmes rodas tieši pie brokastu galda! Seriāls "Midsomeras slepkavības" ieturēts vislabākajās britu klasiskā detektīva tradīcijās: virkne aizdomās turamo, sajauktas pēdas, mīklaini mājieni, neizprotami motīvi un iespēja skatītājam pašam minēt, kurš šoreiz būs vainīgais. Seriāls veiksmīgi izrādīts teju visās Eiropas valstīs, kā arī ASV, Kanādā, Dienvidāfrikā un Tuvajos Austrumos, kopumā tas tiek uzņemts jau vairāk nekā 25 gadus.

programme.title: Labākais no Euromaxx
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: Kas notiek Latvijā?
programme.desc: Diskusijas un intervijas par sabiedrībai nozīmīgām norisēm. Vada žurnālists Jānis Domburs.

programme.title: Sporta studija
programme.desc: "Mūsu uzņemtais virziens izsakāms neformālā sauklī "sports sabiedrībai!". Šis virziens tika uzsākts jau iepriekš ar "Tautas sporta" sižetu sērijām un sporta laukumu kampaņām. Turpmāk LTV Tautas sporta sižeti būs tradicionāla "Sporta studijas" sastāvdaļa. "Sporta Studiju" vadīs rūdītie sporta žurnālisti Dāvids Ernštreits un Reinis Ošenieks, kā arī jaunās sporta žurnālistikas zvaigznes Andris Auziņš, Matīss Timofejevs un Raimonds Gekišs. "Sporta studijas" aktualitātēm sekojiet https://www.facebook.com/LTVSportaStudija

programme.title: Daudz laimes, jubilār!
programme.desc: Dramatiskais tenors Aleksandrs Antoņenko, starptautiska mēroga operas zvaigzne, viens no mūsu slavenākajiem māksliniekiem, jūnijā ir Latvijā ar vairākiem koncertiem, izbrīvējot laiku arī sarunai raidījumā "Daudz laimes, jubilār!". Savulaik Valsts filharmonijas un operas, vēlāk Vācijas operteātru solists, saulaina baritona īpašnieks Aleksandrs Poļakovs izteicies: "Skaistas balsis ir daudziem, bet, lai stāvētu viens daudzgalvainas publikas priekšā, uz lielās operas skatuves, tur vajag iekšēju spēku un jaudu - to katrs nevar! Vienkārši - netur nervi!" Nav šaubu, ka Aleksandram Antoņenko ir ne tikai izcils vokāls, bet varbūt vēl lielāks gars, - ne velti viņu aicinājuši izcili operteātri Ņujorkā, Vīnē, Londonā, Romā, Milānā, Diseldorfā, Berlīnē, Frankfurtē, Minhenē, Grācā un citur pasaulē. Dziedātāja repertuārā ir vadošās tenora partijas: titulloma Dž. Verdi operā "Otello", Kavaradosi (Dž. Pučīni "Toska"), Turidu (P. Maskanji "Zemnieka gods"), Kanio (R. Leonkavallo "Pajaci"), De Grijē (Dž. Pučīni "Manona Lesko"), Kalafs (Dž. Pučīni "Turandota"), Gabriels Adorno (Dž. Verdi "Simons Bokanegra"), Radamess (Dž. Verdi "Aīda"), Diks Džonsons (Dž. Pučīni "Meitene no Rietumiem"), Dons Hosē (Ž. Bizē "Karmena"), Samsons (K. Sensānsa "Samsons un Dalila"), Princis (A. Dvoržāka "Nāra"), Hermanis (P. Čaikovska "Pīķa dāma"), Ismails (Dž. Verdi "Nabuko") u. c.. Saņēmis dažādas profesionālās balvas, tai skaitā Jusi Bjerlinga balvu, Austrijas "Grand Prix de la Culture", vairākkārt "Lielo mūzikas balvu", Latvijas Izcilības balvu kultūrā, kā arī Triju Zvaigžņu ordeni. Būdams Latvijā, Aleksandrs allaž tiekas un rūpējas par savu - un daudzu citu izcilu mākslinieku - skolotāju un vokālo pedagoģi Margaritu Gruzdevu, ko savulaik aicinājis arī uz savām pasaules pirmizrādēm ārzemju operteātros. Raidījumā paralēli profesionāliem stāstiem Aleksandrs dalās ar operdzīves aizkulisēm, niansēm, kur dažādiem sadarbības partneriem, tai skaitā pedagogiem, kā arī veiksmei ir liela nozīme. Jāatzīst, ka būtiska nozīme ir dziedātāja harismai, temperamentam, jūtu amplitūdai, fiziskajai sagatavotībai un pat humora izjūtai. Antoņenko pieskandina telpu ne tikai ar savu vokālo sniegumu, bet arī ar savu versmaino, jokus un provokācijas mīlošo, izaicinājumus pieņemošo prātu, tāpēc saruna raidījumā raisās dzīva un aizraujoša.

programme.title: Latvijas Sirdsdziesma
programme.desc: Latvijas Sirdsdziesma ir sirsnīgi muzikāls raidījums, kurā tiek atspoguļotas tautā vispopulārākās latviešu mūzikas dzīves norises šī vārda visplašākajā nozīmē.

programme.title: Kultūršoks
programme.desc: Kultūra ir ne vien māksla, bet arī nauda, projekti, ražošana un gan radoši, gan postoši konflikti. Par kultūrvides problēmām un šokējošām atklāsmēm — raidījums "Kultūršoks".

programme.title: Kultūrdeva
programme.desc: Raidījumā "Kultūrdeva" viesosies Latvijas Nacionālās operas un baleta vadītājs Sandis Voldiņš, kurš pastāstīs par Rīgas Operas festivālu, kā arī 20 gadu jubileju atzīmējošās "Dabas koncertzāles" veidotāji Ingus Ulmanis un Andris Sējāns, kuri stāstīs par gatavošanos uzvedumam "Invasivus!", kas notiks bijušās Slokas papīrfabrikas teritorijā.

programme.title: Eiropa fokusā
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: Rīta Panorāma
programme.desc: Enerģisks un iedvesmojošs sākums jaunai dienai! Ieskats gaidāmās dienas notikumos Latvijā un pasaulē, kultūras, izklaides un sporta ziņas, laika prognoze. Arī atskats uz aizvadītās dienas notikumiem, pievēršot uzmanību to attīstībai nakts laikā. Aizrautīgas sarunas ar viesiem un skanīgi muzikālie priekšnesumi. Raidījumu vada Gusts Kikusts, Sigurds Siliņš, Karīna Rubene, Danuta Juste, sporta ziņas lasa Reinis Ošenieks, Raimonds Gekišs, laika ziņas – Ilze Skudra, Ilze Golubeva, Toms Bricis.

programme.title: Šodienas jautājums
programme.desc: No pirmdienas līdz ceturtdienai 20:35 LTV1 demonstrē diskusiju raidījumu "Šodienas jautājums", kurā tiek analizēts un skaidrots kāds no attiecīgās dienas svarīgākajiem notikumiem. Koncentrēti, neieslīgstot liekvārdībā, raidījuma dalībnieki runā tiešām par būtiskāko! Operatīvi reaģējot uz aktuālajiem dienas notikumiem, studijā tiešraidē tiekas dažādu jomu eksperti un politiķi.

programme.title: Province
programme.desc: Savā darba ikdienā Inga Saliņa ir valsts iestādes darbiniece. Reiz ļaunais murgs - pandēmijas laiks - ar savu mājsēdi Ingai rezultējās kā visai ražīgs. Kamēr citi tolaik nezināja, ko iesākt, nīka garlaicībā, grima apātijā vai krita atkarībās, viņa savā senču vecsaimniecībā Madonas pusē izlēma ierīkot kārtīgu ofisu attālinātajam darbam un ķērās klāt senajai kūtij. Pirmais savām rokām tapa jauks darba ofiss telekonferencēm un "zūmiem" - nevienam nav jāzina, ka tur reiz mitinājās cūkas un vistas. Un maisam gals bija vaļā. Inga pati trimmerē bērzu jaunaudzi, pieskata bišu saimi un pie katras izdevības kurina pirtskrāsni, lai palutinātu radus un draugus ar kārtīgu lauku pirts garu Bet ir brīži, kad nosvērtā un mierīgā Inga pārvēršas par pavisam citu cilvēku. Un tas ir HOKEJS. Viņa pati smej, ka ar šo atkarību jau esot aplipinājusi arī savu māsu bērnus. Un goda lieta Ingai ir jau vairāk nekā divus gadu desmitus doties uz pasaules čempionātiem, lai kur arī tie notiktu, lai kā kaislīgs fans līdzdzīvotu Latvijas izlases spēlēm.

programme.title: Aizraujošie vilcienu maršruti
programme.desc: Šajā sērijā Maikls Portillo iepazīs plašo Ukrainu. Kijivā mūsdienu ceļotājs apskatīs Svētās Sofijas katedrāli, uzzinās, kā Ukrainā ieradās pareizticība, un centīsies izprast šībrīža konfliktu ar Krieviju. Ukraiņu tautas identitāti viņam palīdzēs iepazīt gan kazaku nometnē, gan kādā virtuvē Ļvivā, kur ukraiņu saimnieces vadībā Maikls gatavos vareņikus. Savukārt, Odesā ceļotājs izzinās pilsētas vēsturi, kas saistīta gan ar Katrīnu II, gan plašu ebreju kopienu, un sērijas noslēgumā ļausies dziednieciskām ūdens procedūrām pilsētas pievārtē.

programme.title: Kultūrdeva
programme.desc: Raidījumā "Kultūrdeva" viesosies Latvijas Nacionālās operas un baleta vadītājs Sandis Voldiņš, kurš pastāstīs par Rīgas Operas festivālu, kā arī 20 gadu jubileju atzīmējošās "Dabas koncertzāles" veidotāji Ingus Ulmanis un Andris Sējāns, kuri stāstīs par gatavošanos uzvedumam "Invasivus!", kas notiks bijušās Slokas papīrfabrikas teritorijā.

programme.title: Slazds - krāpnieku metodes
programme.desc: Par krāpnieku upuri var kļūt ikviens – vajag tikai, lai sakrīt apstākļi. Raidījumā "Slazds" pētīsim, kādas ir krāpnieku shēmas, kādus trikus un psiholoģiskās manipulācijas paņēmienus krāpnieki izmanto un kas notiek, kad pie viņu durvīm klauvē policija. Pētīsim gan biežāk sastopamos krāpšanas veidus, gan arī tos, kur noziedznieki ķērušies pie inovatīvām, pagaidām reti pielietotām tehnoloģijām. "Slazdā" runās paši upuri, noziedznieki un tie, kuru darbs ir viņus ķert, bet eksperti analizēs un skaidros – kā krāpniekiem izdevās pierunāt saprātīgus cilvēkus darīt nesaprātīgas lietas.

programme.title: Tad un tagad
programme.desc: Depresija un izdegšana ļoti daudzu cilvēku dzīvēs ir neatņemama ikdienas sastāvdaļa. Arī augstie pašnāvību rādītāji Latvijā liek domāt, ka psihiskās veselības lauciņā problēmu ir daudz. Raidījums "Tad un tagad" skaidro, vai tā tas ir bijis arī agrāk vai tā tomēr ir tikai mūsdienu kaite un šobrīd dzīvojam emocionāli vāju cilvēku laikmetā? Cik sena ir depresija un ar kādām diagnozēm ļaudis nonāca psihoneiroloģiskajā slimnīcā 20. gadsimta vidū - tie ir tikai daži no jautājumiem, uz kuriem meklēsim atbildes.

programme.title: TE! Latvijas raidījums
programme.desc: Astoņās raidījuma sērijās, ceļojot laikā caur Latvijas pagātni, tagadni un potenciālo nākotni, ar piedzīvojuma garšu, rotaļīgumu un izteiktu klātbūtnes sajūtu "TE!" vedīs jaunos Latvijas apceļošanas piedzīvojumos. Raidījumu vada Marta Selecka, Dace Salnāja, Māris Olte, Pauls Timrots, Māra Sleja un Gustavs Terzens. Raidījumu veido "VFS Films", un projektu līdzfinansē Mediju atbalsta fonds no Latvijas valsts budžeta līdzekļiem.

programme.title: Alpu dakteris
programme.desc: Nav labākas vietas, kur patverties no pilsētas kņadas, trokšņa un stresa, kā kalni. Bet dzīvot tur? Dzimto Alpu mazpilsētiņu, saucot tās gaisotni par smacējošu un aprobežotu, Mārtins pameta jau pirms daudziem gadiem, lai kļūtu par veiksmīgu ārstu kosmopolītiskajā lielpilsētā Ņujorkā. Nu viņš ir atgriezies. Uz pavisam īsu apciemojumu, lai atkal drīz atvadītos. Taču no likteņa neizbēgsi - atgriešanās mājās izrādās uz palikšanu. Jo pārāk liels ir trieciens, uzzinot, ka viņa pirmā mīlestība, kas pēc Mārtina aizbraukšanas apprecēja viņa paša brāli Hansu, ir mirusi. Taču atstājusi meitu, par kuras esamību Mārtins nekad pat nebija zinājis! Ar to izrādās pietiekami, lai izlemtu palikt Pēkšņi kļuvis par tēvu, Mārtins vēlas uzzināt vairāk par savu jauniegūto meitu Lili, iemantot viņas uzticēšanos. Tā dēļ viņš ir gatavs pat mēģināt sadarboties ar savu jaunāko brāli Hansu, kas joprojām jūt aizvainojumu. Hanss ir kļuvis par glābēju komandas vadītāju, un kopā ar Mārtinu viņi turpmāk neskaitāmas reizes riskēs ar savu dzīvību, lai glābtu kalnu negadījumu upurus vai kāpējus, ko pārsteigusi pēkšņa vētra. Mārtinu gaida atklāsme, ka bez saknēm nav iespējas turpināt dzīvi. Šeit viņš pilnībā aptvers arī to, ka būt par ārstu kalnos - tā nav tikai profesija, bet gan aicinājums. Kļūt par labu neatliekamās medicīniskās palīdzības sniedzēju kalnos iemācīties nevar, par tādu piedzimst. Un Mārtins Grūbers tāds neapšaubāmi ir!

programme.title: Vienmēr formā!
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls

programme.title: Aizliegtais paņēmiens
programme.desc: Lai uzzinātu par kāda notikuma patiesajiem apstākļiem vai iesaistīto personu nodomiem, raidījuma "Aizliegtais paņēmiens" komanda informācijas iegūšanai izmanto visdažādākos izmeklējošās žurnālistikas paņēmienus un žanrus – eksperimentus, testus, provokācijas, padziļinātus pētījumus, arī anonīmas intervijas. Žurnālisti padziļināti pēta un skatītājiem atklāj sociālpolitiskus tematus, kas ne vienmēr tiek izcelti citos medijos. Raidījums atklāj un atmasko, atsevišķos gadījumos sauc pie atbildības iesaistītās personas, norāda uz likumu nepilnībām, aicina mainīt pastāvošo kārtību, ja tā ir pretrunā sabiedrības interesēm. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta žurnālists Guntis Bojārs.

programme.title: Futbols. Baltijas kauss
programme.desc: Baltijas kausa izcīņā futbolā - fināls un spēle par trešo vietu. Latvijas līdzjutēji cer, ka komanda spēlēs finālā, bet jebkurā gadījumā cīņa notiks Rīgā, LNK sporta parkā, kur valstsvienība spēlēs pirmo reizi. Pagājušonedēļ bija abi pusfināli - Latvija spēlēja Kauņā pret Lietuvu un Igaunija - pret Fēru salām. Uzvarētāji tiksies finālā, zaudētāji cīnīsies par trešo vietu. Latvijai jau izdevies vairākkārt iegūt Baltijas kausu, un tāds mērķis Paolo Nikolato vadītajai komandai ir arī šogad. Tā ir kā laba sagatavošanās Eiropas līgas turnīram, kurā Latvija saglabāja vietu pēc spēka trešajā jeb C līgā. Jau septembrī būs jātiekas izbraukumā ar Armēniju un mājās - ar Kipru. Oktobrī jāspēlē mājās pret Melnkalni un izbraukumā - pret Kipru, novembrī būs spēle Melnkalnē un tad pēdējā cīņa savā laukumā pret Armēniju.

programme.title: Vetārsts Jākobss
programme.desc: Švānicā, mazā ziemeļu ciemā pie Baltijas jūras, ierodas Hauke Jākobss, kurš tur grib atvērt veterināro klīniku. Tas visvairāk iepriecina agrākā veterinārārsta asistenti Jūli Kristianzeni, kura baidās palikt bez darba un dzīvesvietas. Arī vietējo policisti Lonu Fogtu ieinteresē jaunais ciema iedzīvotājs, kad viņa uzzina, ka Hauke agrāk strādājis Hamburgas policijā. Taču Hauke izvairās no uzmanības un nelabprāt runā par savu pagātni, dodot priekšroku izolētai dzīvei uz kutera kopā ar suni Holiju.

programme.title: Melnais saraksts
programme.desc: Kritiķu un skatītāju iemīļots kriminālseriāls. Tā darbība sākas dienā, kad darbu FIB galvenajā birojā Vašingtonā uzsāk jauna profilētāja Elizabete Kīna. Tajā pašā rītā tur ierodas viens no FIB meklētākajiem noziedzniekiem, Reimonds "Reds" Redingtons, un labprātīgi ļauj sevi notvert. Reds palīdz FIB sagūstīt citu bīstamu noziedznieku un novērst uzbrukumu civiliedzīvotājiem. Viņš paziņo, ka viņam esot vesels saraksts un informācija par tādiem noziedzniekiem un teroristiem, par kuru esamību FIB pat nenojauš. Reds ir gatavs sadarboties ar vienu savādu noteikumu – viņš runās tikai ar Elizabeti. Tā sākas īpašas attiecības, kuru īstā daba un iemesls ir zināmi tikai Redingtonam. Lai gan pamatā seriāla darbība norit ASV, tas aizved arī uz dažādām eksotiskām vietām visā pasaulē un ļauj ieskatīties kriminālajā pasaulē. Dažādiem apbalvojumiem vairāku gadu laikā izvirzīti seriāla specefektu veidotāji, kaskadieri un muzikālais noformējums.

programme.title: Sazvērestība armijas bāzē
programme.desc: Jo dziļāk dzelmē, jo biezāka tumsa... Jūrā noslēpumainā kārtā pazūd Skotijas zvejas traleris, bet atomzemūdenē "Vigil" nenoskaidrotos apstākļos iet bojā kāds kareivis. Skotijas policijas izmeklētāja Eimija Silva tiek nosūtīta uz zemūdeni, kas stratēģiski svarīgu uzdevumu dēļ nedrīkst piestāt krastā. Viņa atklāj nopietnu sazvērestību... Raksturā un garā spēcīgās sievietes un policijas izmeklētājas Eimijas Silvas lomas atveidotāja ir britu aktrise Sarana Džounsa, kura filmējusies dažādos atzītos britu seriālos, tostarp "Skots un Beilija", "Džentlmenis Džeks" un "Daktere Fostere", par Fosteres lomu iegūstot vairākas kino balvas, tostarp BAFTA balvu "2016. gada labākā aktrise". Seriāla ideja radās producentam Džordžam Aza-Selindžeram, kurš kādā intervijā uzrunāja scenāristu Tomu Edžu, lai piedāvātu radīt TV seriālu par zemūdeni. Viņu iedvesmojusi Lielbritānijas zemūdenēs dienējošo komandu ikdiena. Seriāls tika filmēts galvenokārt Skotijā. Seriāla veidotāju komanda radījusi arī seriālu "Dienestu pildot" ("Line of Duty").

programme.title: Neej uz randiņu ar Brendonu!
programme.desc: Stāsts balstīts uz patiesiem notikumiem par Emberu, kura, izmantojot iepazīšanās lietotnes, satiek šķietami ideālu vīrieti – Brendonu Džonsonu. Viņu straujās romantiskās attiecības drīz vien pārtop laulībā, taču tad Embera sāk pamanīt dīvainas un satraucošas lietas. Kopā ar Brendona bijušo sievu Atīnu viņa atklāj virkni melu, manipulāciju un bīstamu uzvedību. Atklājas, ka Brendonam ir pagātne – vairākas sievietes un pat tiesas spriedumi. Šo sieviešu stāsts kalpo kā brīdinājums par toksiskām attiecībām, krāpšanu un vardarbību.

programme.title: Ceļā ar kameru. Ar mugursomām pa Latīņameriku
programme.desc: Kā trīs latviešu jaunieši - Matīss Žagars, Jurģis Kmins un Alise Kmina - apceļoja Latīņameriku

programme.title: Kultūras ABC
programme.desc: Latvijas Televīzijas raidījums "Kultūras ABC".

programme.title: Kultūras ABC
programme.desc: Latvijas Televīzijas raidījums "Kultūras ABC".

programme.title: Province
programme.desc: Savā darba ikdienā Inga Saliņa ir valsts iestādes darbiniece. Reiz ļaunais murgs - pandēmijas laiks - ar savu mājsēdi Ingai rezultējās kā visai ražīgs. Kamēr citi tolaik nezināja, ko iesākt, nīka garlaicībā, grima apātijā vai krita atkarībās, viņa savā senču vecsaimniecībā Madonas pusē izlēma ierīkot kārtīgu ofisu attālinātajam darbam un ķērās klāt senajai kūtij. Pirmais savām rokām tapa jauks darba ofiss telekonferencēm un "zūmiem" - nevienam nav jāzina, ka tur reiz mitinājās cūkas un vistas. Un maisam gals bija vaļā. Inga pati trimmerē bērzu jaunaudzi, pieskata bišu saimi un pie katras izdevības kurina pirtskrāsni, lai palutinātu radus un draugus ar kārtīgu lauku pirts garu Bet ir brīži, kad nosvērtā un mierīgā Inga pārvēršas par pavisam citu cilvēku. Un tas ir HOKEJS. Viņa pati smej, ka ar šo atkarību jau esot aplipinājusi arī savu māsu bērnus. Un goda lieta Ingai ir jau vairāk nekā divus gadu desmitus doties uz pasaules čempionātiem, lai kur arī tie notiktu, lai kā kaislīgs fans līdzdzīvotu Latvijas izlases spēlēm.

programme.title: Vides fakti
programme.desc: Raidījums par norisēm dabā un apkārtējā vidē. "Vides fakti" sniedz informāciju par sezonālām norisēm dabā un dzīvnieku pasaulē, par vides aktualitātēm, par videi draudzīgu dzīvesveidu, par aktuālām cilvēka un vides attiecībām ārpus Latvijas robežām. Raidījumā "Vides fakti" ir skatāmi arī piedzīvojumu sižeti par aktīvā tūrisma iespējām Latvijā, kā arī īsfilmas par neparastiem ceļojumiem pasaulē.

programme.title: De facto
programme.desc: LTV Ziņu dienesta veidotajā analītiski pētnieciskajā raidījumā "De Facto" skatītājiem nozīmīgus jautājumus izmeklē žurnālisti Matīss Arnicāns, Inga Šņore, Laine Fedotova, Ivo Leitāns un Ella Semjonova. "De Facto" uzmanības lokā ir netaisnības un pretrunas – ne tikai korupcijas, interešu konfliktu un citu noziedzīgu nodarījumu lietas, bet arī sabiedrībai būtisku cieņpilnas attieksmes un ētiskas rīcības pārkāpumu izmeklēšana.

programme.title: Pasaules panorāma
programme.desc: Globālo ziņu laikmetā notikums Āzijā vai Amerikas kontinentā jau rīt var mainīt dzīvi Eiropā, bet lēmums, kas pieņemts Rīgā – atbalsoties visā pasaulē. "Pasaules panorāma" piedāvā neatkarīgas un uzticamas ziņas, atspoguļojot un analizējot ārpolitikas aktualitātes, kā arī sarunas ar politologiem, ārpolitikas ekspertiem, pasaulē pazīstamām personībām par svarīgāko Baltijā un Ziemeļvalstīs, citviet Eiropā, kā arī visā pasaulē. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta ārzemju ziņu redaktori Toms Pastors un Ina Strazdiņa.

programme.title: V.I.P. - Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts
programme.desc: Otrais pusfināls ar akadēmisko mūžorganizāciju dalībniekiem. Komandu kapteiņi - Sandis Proms ("Fraternitas Aeratorum") un Nikolajs Voicehovskis ("Fraternitas Arctika"). Nikolajs Voicehovskis - komandas kapteinis, strādā un mācās, mācās un strādā, ir "Fraternitas Arctica" biedrs. Nikolajs aizraujas ar visa veida prāta spēlēm un aktīvo atpūtu, hobijus meklē tādus, kas apvieno prasmes ar zināšanām un ceļojumiem. Labprāt izzina Latviju, braucot ar elektrisko monoriteni, enduro motociklu vai auto. Leonīds Stepanovs - "Fraternitas Arctica" komiltonis. Pēc izglītības mežzinātnieks, strādā par ugunsdzēsēju glābēju un industriālo alpīnistu. Ironizē, ka sēdošs darbs reizēm ir bīstamāks par darbu uz jumtiem vai ugunsgrēka situācijā. Leonīdu motivē izaicinājumi, viņš viegli piekrīt jaunām avantūrām un piedzīvojumiem, par kādu uzskata arī dalību "V.I.P.". Edvards Kupšis - "Fraternitas Arctica" fuksis. Studē vēsturi un biznesa menedžmentu, ir daudzpusīgs, viņu interesē sports, prāta spēles un viss, kas saistīts ar kultūru, tostarp populāro, numismātika un kino. Viņa dzīves moto: "Neatliec uz rītdienu to, ko vari izdarīt aizparīt." Sandis Proms - komandas kapteinis. Latgales akadēmiskās organizācijas "Fraternitas Aeratorum" biedrs. Klientu apkalpošanas daļas vadītājs siltumenerģijas ražošanas uzņēmumā, ikdienā daudz komunicē ar cilvēkiem, tāpēc brīvajā laikā īpaši novērtē klusumu. Aizrauj ceļošana, makšķerēšana un aktīvs dzīvesveids - patīk gan piedzīvot ko jaunu, gan arī kādreiz vienkārši pabūt dabā ar makšķeri rokās. Seko līdzi sporta notikumiem. Armands Ūzuliņš - studē tiesību zinātņu maģistra programmu RTU Rēzeknes akadēmijā. 10 gadus aktīvi darbojas Zemessardzē. Paralēli darbam un studijām palīdz tēvam saimnieciskajos darbos mājās un uzņēmumā. Kopš bērnības interesē vēsture, kas vienmēr ir palīdzējusi labāk izprast arī mūsdienu procesus. Mārtiņš Taukuls - ar maģistra grādu vadībā un administrēšanā strādā par pēcpārdošanas servisa vadītāju. Ir darbīgs cilvēks, brīvajā laikā strādā savā piemājas saimniecībā, interesē agronomija, lauksaimniecība un tās tehnika, ir inovatīvu tehnoloģiju entuziasts. Dejo Viļānu deju kolektīvā "Austra". Patīk arī iepazīt citas kultūras ceļojot.

programme.title: Aizliegtais paņēmiens
programme.desc: Lai uzzinātu par kāda notikuma patiesajiem apstākļiem vai iesaistīto personu nodomiem, raidījuma "Aizliegtais paņēmiens" komanda informācijas iegūšanai izmanto visdažādākos izmeklējošās žurnālistikas paņēmienus un žanrus – eksperimentus, testus, provokācijas, padziļinātus pētījumus, arī anonīmas intervijas. Žurnālisti padziļināti pēta un skatītājiem atklāj sociālpolitiskus tematus, kas ne vienmēr tiek izcelti citos medijos. Raidījums atklāj un atmasko, atsevišķos gadījumos sauc pie atbildības iesaistītās personas, norāda uz likumu nepilnībām, aicina mainīt pastāvošo kārtību, ja tā ir pretrunā sabiedrības interesēm. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta žurnālists Guntis Bojārs.

programme.title: Manas brīvdienas
programme.desc: Lieliskākais nedēļas nogales pavadonis – TOP 40 formāta raidījums "Manas brīvdienas" ar labāko un svaigāko mūziku.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: On the west coast of Puerto Rico, Air and Marine Operations chase down and arrest smugglers caught tossing bales of cocaine overboard. At the Fort Lauderdale Airport, U.S. Customs and Border Protection seizes over a thousand hydrocodone pills from an airline pilot returning from Colombia. At Atlanta International Airport, CBP consults with archaeologists to verify the authenticity of several artifacts they suspect were looted.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Lost Beasts: Unearthed
programme.desc: Lost Beasts Unearthed combines unique access to real-time palaeontology investigations, pioneering technology and explosive CGI animations to unlock the mysteries of the biggest beasts ever to have lived on our planet. From deadly T-Rex's to giant woolly mammoths and terrifying sabre-tooth tigers to ancient sea-monsters. New evidence reveals how these giants evolved to conquer the planet, how they grew so big, how they hunted, what they ate, how they fought and what triggered their extinction.

programme.title: Lost Beasts: Unearthed
programme.desc: Lost Beasts Unearthed combines unique access to real-time palaeontology investigations, pioneering technology and explosive CGI animations to unlock the mysteries of the biggest beasts ever to have lived on our planet. From deadly T-Rex's to giant woolly mammoths and terrifying sabre-tooth tigers to ancient sea-monsters. New evidence reveals how these giants evolved to conquer the planet, how they grew so big, how they hunted, what they ate, how they fought and what triggered their extinction.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: August 22nd, 1985 British Airtours Flight #28 is taking off from Manchester Airport for the Greek Island of Corfu. As the aircraft is accelerating, a loud thud emanates from the fuselage, and the pilots abandon takeoff. They believe a tire has blown, but passengers on the left side of the plane see the real problem one of the engines is on fire. Soon, thick black smoke fills the cabin, panicked passengers struggle to escape, and just minutes later, the aircraft is completely ravaged by fire. 55 people die. Can investigators determine how a minor emergency turned into one of the worst disasters in British aviation history?

programme.title: Superstorm New York: What Really Happened
programme.desc: Experts investigate the cause behind the storm that ravaged New York, as well as scrutinise the US government's response plans.

programme.title: The Next Mega Tsunami
programme.desc: Ten years after one of the most deadly tsunamis ever known, scientists are making a shocking discovery. Experts used to believe that the biggest killer waves were only generated in a handful of regions.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation

Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Europe from Above
programme.desc: Europe from Above takes to the air over Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, Spain and the UK to showcase Europe's finest cultural and geographical landmarks as you've never seen them before. Stunning aerial hyper-lapse photography allows us to visualise the changes of a season in seconds, as tulip fields in the Netherlands magically burst into colour and waterfalls in the Dolomites turn to ice. We reveal how tradition, engineering and natural wonders have shaped this epic continent - a vibrant portrait of these regions and the people who keep their traditions alive.

programme.title: Europe from Above
programme.desc: Europe from Above takes to the air over Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, Spain and the UK to showcase Europe's finest cultural and geographical landmarks as you've never seen them before. Stunning aerial hyper-lapse photography allows us to visualise the changes of a season in seconds, as tulip fields in the Netherlands magically burst into colour and waterfalls in the Dolomites turn to ice. We reveal how tradition, engineering and natural wonders have shaped this epic continent - a vibrant portrait of these regions and the people who keep their traditions alive.

programme.title: Easter Island Unsolved
programme.desc: This is among the most remote inhabited islands on the planet. Rapa Nui, a once vibrant utopian island culture, settled 1000 years ago, with remarkable art and ritual; and then collapse. The show examines the beginning and the end of the Eastern Islanders, through a series of cautionary tales and colorful spectacle. Today, due to rising oceans and coastal erosion, this rare gem and 1,100 moai statue are at risk of disappearing from sight for all time.

programme.title: Buried Truth of the Maya
programme.desc: Blending wit, wisdom and wanderlust, our adventurous host and team of explorers will mount extreme expeditions to shed new light on some of the planet's greatest mysteries. Each episode will take us past mere myths and legends, utilizing the latest in science and technology to present a new point of view on historical events, megalithic structures and archeological mysteries.

programme.title: Rome Underground
programme.desc: Featuring the parallel stories of a supersize building project and a jaw-dropping archaeological adventure, Rome Underground takes viewers on an immersive journey deep under the Eternal City — revealing how the construction of a 26-kilometer subway line through the heart of historic Rome has literally unearthed some of the most important discoveries of the modern age. At the intersection of technology and archaeology, this documentary chronicles the ambitious mega-project from every angle. With state-of-the-art modelling and 3D animation, it brings the ancient world vividly to life.

programme.title: Hidden Beneath the Cities
programme.desc: In Midyat, Turkey, archaeologists uncover the vast underground city of Matiate, stretching across tunnels and chambers carved thousands of years ago. Evidence of churches, synagogues and Roman coins suggests it was once a refuge for people fleeing religious persecution. In Royston, England, workmen stumble upon a mysterious chalk-carved chamber filled with intricate religious carvings. Beneath Orvieto, Italy, a wine cellar excavation reveals Cavità 254, a striking Etruscan subterranean complex. Once a quarry or water system, its deliberate infilling with pottery and bones hints at ritual or symbolic burial practices. Finally, in Abarkuh, Iran, archaeologists map a massive subterranean tunnel network. Likely part of an ancient qanat water system, exemplifying Persian ingenuity, it used engineering to survive drought, war and desert heat.

programme.title: Hidden Beneath the Cities
programme.desc: In Poland, miners uncovered vast salt chambers known as the Crystal Caves, filled with massive halite crystals formed millions of years ago. Over centuries, this industrial mine evolved into a spiritual and cultural sanctuary. In England, a declassified Cold War relic known as the Burlington Bunker is revealed. Built in secret as a sprawling underground government headquarters, it could sustain people for months, but new evidence suggests it may also have served as a strategic decoy. In Egypt, archaeologists discovered a 3,400-year-old New Kingdom settlement buried beneath ruins, challenging assumptions about Egypt's western frontier. Finally, in China, the mysterious Longyou Caves baffle experts. Their precise engineering and unknown purpose make them one of the world's most enigmatic ancient constructions that still defy explanation.

programme.title: Ancient Structures: Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: From ancient temples to soaring cathedrals, humanity's deepest beliefs have given rise to sacred architecture. Rome's Pantheon, with its perfect dome and mysterious oculus, blends beauty and functionality in ways that puzzle modern architects to this day. Rising majestically from the sea, the gravity-defying Mont Saint-Michel reveals the extraordinary vision and skill of its builders, who overcame tides and challenging foundations to construct a monastery high on a rocky island. And the Porta Nigra, the best-preserved Roman city gate north of the Alps, finds its fate hanging in the balance until a Greek hermit's arrival transforms this military stronghold into a sacred sanctuary, ensuring its survival through the centuries.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Air France Flight #296 (Airbus A320) June 26th, 1988 The Airbus A-320 the worlds most sophisticated passenger jet takes off for its maiden passenger flight and first-ever public demonstration. The plane is headed for the Habsheim Air Show where the pilots are planning a breathtaking, low-altitude fly-over. But after getting into position over the tiny airfield the exhibition turns to disaster. The plane plows into a forest and is consumed by flames. It is a horrible tragedy, and a public relations nightmare for Airbus. With such a huge investment on the line, there is enormous pressure on investigators to determine whether the pilot or the plane was at fault.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Lost Temple of the Inca
programme.desc: Legendary archeologist Johan Reinhard spent his career searching for the lost temples of the Inca Empire, discovering all but one: Ausangate, named after one of the most sacred mountains in Peru. Now in his seventies, he's handed the torch to environmental scientist Preston Sowell, who makes a mysterious discovery at an alpine lake near Mt Ausangate that he believes is the lost temple. This film follows Sowell's journey of discovery, loss and adventure as he seeks the truth about this sacred place.

programme.title: Lost Cities with Albert Lin
programme.desc: Lost Cities combines hi-tech archaeology, breath-taking visuals and genuine exploration to make headline-grabbing discoveries. Lost Cities brings adventure, science and archaeology together through our host Albert Lin. Our ambitious approach applies 3D scanning to some of the most extraordinary sites of antiquity. This series will deliver powerful, emotional stories with hi-tech imagery to bring the mysteries of the past vividly to life.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: How did Rome rise to dominate so much of the ancient world? Off the coast of Sicily, investigators discover traces of a crucial naval battle. Using divers, an underwater robot and a crane, they haul a long lost battleship relic to the surface. In Terracina, south of Rome, a team of archaeologists dig inside an ancient mountaintop temple, and in Carthage, Tunisia, clues reveal how one deadly rivalry tilted the scales of power in favour of Rome.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: The series that follows international teams of archaeologists as they embark on a season of excavations to unravel the secrets of life in the Roman Empire. How did the Colosseum - an arena for bloody gladiatorial battles - become the greatest symbol of the Roman Empire? Archaeologists venture into the Colosseum's ruins, and launch digs across the Empire, to hunt for clues. As teams descend into hidden tunnels and unearth long-lost amphitheatres in Tuscany and Britain, they piece together the surprising truth about Rome's iconic Colosseum.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Rome
programme.desc: Pompeii was a thriving town on the southern coast of Italy, until it came to a sudden end in 79AD. The eruption of a nearby volcano, Mount Vesuvius, erupted, burying the city in millions of tonnes of ash and debris. Now excavators are digging to unearth the dark side of this idyllic Roman town by uncovering an enslaved person's room.

programme.title: Ancient Structures: Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Since the dawn of humanity, we have looked to the cosmos to understand our world. In the lush jungles of Southeast Asia, Khmer King Suryavarman II commissioned Angkor Wat, an elaborate stone masterpiece devoted to Vishnu. With precise measurements embedded into its very foundations, this temple is an ornate blueprint of the Hindu universe. Across the globe, another structure in Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula stands in tribute to the heavens. A relic of the ancient Maya civilization, the Pyramid of Kukulcan displays the divine light of the equinoctial sun across its façade, while hiding sacred secrets beneath. In Ireland, a near-forgotten cairn harbors mysteries illuminated by the winter sun. Newgrange, an ancestral tomb built by neolithic farmers, is adorned with strange carvings and features a cosmic design centuries ahead of its time.

programme.title: Hidden Beneath the Cities
programme.desc: In Midyat, Turkey, archaeologists uncover the vast underground city of Matiate, stretching across tunnels and chambers carved thousands of years ago. Evidence of churches, synagogues and Roman coins suggests it was once a refuge for people fleeing religious persecution. In Royston, England, workmen stumble upon a mysterious chalk-carved chamber filled with intricate religious carvings. Beneath Orvieto, Italy, a wine cellar excavation reveals Cavità 254, a striking Etruscan subterranean complex. Once a quarry or water system, its deliberate infilling with pottery and bones hints at ritual or symbolic burial practices. Finally, in Abarkuh, Iran, archaeologists map a massive subterranean tunnel network. Likely part of an ancient qanat water system, exemplifying Persian ingenuity, it used engineering to survive drought, war and desert heat.

programme.title: Lost Temple of the Inca
programme.desc: Legendary archeologist Johan Reinhard spent his career searching for the lost temples of the Inca Empire, discovering all but one: Ausangate, named after one of the most sacred mountains in Peru. Now in his seventies, he's handed the torch to environmental scientist Preston Sowell, who makes a mysterious discovery at an alpine lake near Mt Ausangate that he believes is the lost temple. This film follows Sowell's journey of discovery, loss and adventure as he seeks the truth about this sacred place.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Spring has arrived and Margot heads out, in search of bear - but ends up face to face with an even more formidable force of nature. Billy takes advantage of warmer weather and begins work on some much-needed cabin upgrades. Matty goes full "hillbilly" with his plans for the ultimate backwoods deep freeze; And Emilie and Gilbert get to work on a "Shabotwan" - a traditional structure they to hope to finish before the spring goose hunt begins.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot, caught off guard by an unplanned litter of puppies, prepares to leave her Yukon trapline early. In need of metal for his new forge, Billy embarks on a backwoods salvage mission. With their supply of meat running low, Emilie and Gilbert hit the trail for a late-season caribou hunt, and in an effort to embrace his new island lifestyle to the fullest, Matty takes to sea and tries his hand at scallop fishing.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: During the night-time rush hour, Air Traffic Controller George Perkins gets the call all controllers dread: a plane needs to make an emergency landing at Dubai after an engine shutdown. He has to clear the runway and scramble the emergency services for a landing that could shutter the airport. Airport Services Manager Mel Sabharwal is called in to find out why a transit passenger has live snakes in her bag. In preparation for an ambitious programme of runway repairs, Jumah Al-Mazrooie inspects the overspill airport and finds dangerous debris, storm drains full of sand, and a CCTV system that isn't working. Customs Officers detain a suspicious passenger and find 14kg of heroin secreted in the lining of his suitcase. And Carl Perkins has to avoid damaging expensive cars while loading them into a plane's cargo hold.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: Firefighters rush to the aid of a 777 full of passengers that touches down with smoking landing gear; a man loses his son in the world's biggest airport terminal just minutes before their plane is due to depart; two passengers arrive at Customs with bags stuffed full of the most expensive wood in the world; staff at the airport's exclusive VIP Service prepare for the arrival of footballing legend Pele; and the airport engineering team gears up for a construction project that will put the whole airport's operation and reputation on the line.

programme.title: Lost Temple of the Inca
programme.desc: Legendary archeologist Johan Reinhard spent his career searching for the lost temples of the Inca Empire, discovering all but one: Ausangate, named after one of the most sacred mountains in Peru. Now in his seventies, he's handed the torch to environmental scientist Preston Sowell, who makes a mysterious discovery at an alpine lake near Mt Ausangate that he believes is the lost temple. This film follows Sowell's journey of discovery, loss and adventure as he seeks the truth about this sacred place.

programme.title: Lost Cities with Albert Lin
programme.desc: Lost Cities combines hi-tech archaeology, breath-taking visuals and genuine exploration to make headline-grabbing discoveries. Lost Cities brings adventure, science and archaeology together through our host Albert Lin. Our ambitious approach applies 3D scanning to some of the most extraordinary sites of antiquity. This series will deliver powerful, emotional stories with hi-tech imagery to bring the mysteries of the past vividly to life.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: En route to the Shetland Islands, a high-tech turboprop is struck by lightning, temporarily blinding the crew and disabling their controls. The pilots declare a Mayday as the plane plunges into a terrifying nosedive. Just seconds before impact, they manage to regain control. And once they're safely on the ground, investigators uncover an unusual feature in the plane that plays a key role in this calamity.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on one of the most iconic cars to have ever come out of Germany, a BMW E30 Alpina. The car belongs to car obsessive Maz, a town planner from Walsall, whose dream to restore the car came to an end when he was struck down with a near fatal genetic disorder. Once the car arrives at the workshop not only do the boys discover that it's full of rot, but that it might not actually be the special edition it proports to be. Alpina or not Alpina - that is the question!

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take a trip back in time in a Fiesta XR2,a fast Ford from the 1980s and the car that Fuzz learned to drive in. The car belongs to Brian, who planned to restore the car to show winning condition, however when he started suffering from health problems the project ground to a halt. Brian's family contacted Car SOS hoping that a fully restored XR2 would bring a ray of sunshine into his life.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Maya Snake Kings
programme.desc: Fascinating documentary series from National Geographic that sheds new light on the mystifying Maya civilisation. With astounding new evidence, scientists, archaeologists and historians have uncovered the complexity and advancement of this Central American civilisation, which lived across southeastern Mexico, Belize, Honduras, El Salvador and Guatemala. These experts have used advanced technology to scour the jungles of Guatemala, discovering approximately 60,000 new structures that reveal the meandering network of infrastructure which connected the Maya people. One of the ruling dynasties of this ancient era were the Snake Kings, who until recently were unknown. These intriguing new discoveries reveal the extent of the Snake Kings power as they even conquered Tikal, the greatest city in Mayan history.

programme.title: Cleopatra's Final Secret
programme.desc: Archaeologist Kathleen Martinez is leading a thrilling detective hunt on land and underwater, to unearth the final pieces of the puzzle that will unlock the story of Cleopatra's last days. Armed with the latest technology and the unparalleled skills of explorer Bob Ballard, she is guaranteed to make extraordinary discoveries. This could be the find of the century: Cleopatra's Lost Tomb.

programme.title: The Fall Of Osama Bin Laden
programme.desc: Journalist Peter Bergen returns to investigate the United States intelligence operation to hunt down and kill the world's most wanted terrorist. Take a deep dive into critical intel gathered by Navy SEALs on hard drives and in a collection of letters and journals confiscated from bin Laden's Abbottabad compound.

programme.title: Inside North Korea: The Kim Dynasty
programme.desc: The final episode starts with the death of Kim Jong Il and the rise of the new leader of North Korea - his son, Kim Jong Un, taking power at the age of 28. Using exclusive interviews, firsthand testimony and expertly curated archive, "Rocket Man" charts Un's reign from 2011 to present day; delves into how Un consolidated power, by killing his uncle and his half-brother; examines the incredible story of his unexpected friendship with basketball star Dennis Rodman; retells his announcing that he has nuclear weapons that can reach the United States; and breaks down the historic 2018 summit with US President Trump.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: A double life within a double life: A former CIA chief of base utilizes her knowledge of covert exfiltration and the connections she made while working as one of America's top spies to help rescue vulnerable people during the chaos following the 2021 U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan. Tapping into years of covert experience, she stepped out of retirement and into action to try and save as many lives as she could.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: Tracking the butcher: A father's mission to bring justice to one of the most feared members of the Taliban reaches a turning point when a teenage boy within his inner circle is captured during a raid. With this unexpected breakthrough and the aid of the CIA's most advanced covert tracking technology, agents close in on the elusive figure known as "The Butcher." What began as a distant mission for justice now inches toward a final resolution.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: September 1, 1983 Korean Air Lines Flight #007 is high above the Sea of Japan with 269 people on board. Hoping to save fuel during the last leg of its marathon flight from New York to Seoul, it requests permission to fly at a higher altitude. When the aircraft reaches its new altitude, however, it is rocked by rapid decompression, spirals out of control and crashes into the sea. An international controversy erupts, and within days, Soviet officials admit to shooting down the passenger plane. With Cold War tensions at an all-time high, its up to international investigators to keep two superpowers at bay. But can they prevent an all-out armed conflict, and can they determine what went wrong?

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Lost Continent of the Pacific
programme.desc: Legends of lost civilizations have captivated people throughout time. During the Age of Discovery, explorers searched the Pacific in vain for a mysterious land they called "terra incognita" or "unknown land." To this day, the elders on Easter Island claim their ancestors came from a continent called Hiva, believed to have sunk after a great disaster. Now, new scientific evidence points to a remote island chain in Polynesia as the center of an ancient, thriving civilization. For over 400 years these islands have been known as the Marquesas Archipelago, but before that the native Polynesians called them simply "The Isles of Hiva". Could they be a remnant of the lost continent of Hiva? Using new archeological and geological evidence together with oral tradition and voyaging techniques passed down for centuries, we are unveiling The Lost Continent Of The Pacific: a world of water and exploration, of human sacrifice and epic voyagers who had settled the largest ocean on Earth centuries before Columbus reached America.

programme.title: Atlantis Rising
programme.desc: Executive Produced by James Cameron, "Atlantis Discovered" is a 1x120 detective thriller that seeks out, uncovers and explores artifacts such as archaeological finds, satellite photographs, manuscripts hiding in plain sight, underwater exploration, etc. and attempt to "decode" the artifacts as springboards to further the investigation to get to the bottom of the story.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: On the west coast of Puerto Rico, Air and Marine Operations chase down and arrest smugglers caught tossing bales of cocaine overboard. At the Fort Lauderdale Airport, U.S. Customs and Border Protection seizes over a thousand hydrocodone pills from an airline pilot returning from Colombia. At Atlanta International Airport, CBP consults with archaeologists to verify the authenticity of several artifacts they suspect were looted.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Air and Marine Operations in St. Thomas arrest a suspected smuggler and chase a vessel fleeing into British Virgin Island waters. U.S. Customs and Border Protection busts a mother-daughter duo smuggling large amounts of marijuana through Miami International Airport to the Caribbean. In El Paso, alerts from the K9 at the Sierra Blanca checkpoint lead U.S. Border Patrol agents to the discovery of drugs and guns in multiple vehicles.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: The U.S. Coast Guard stops smugglers with over 13,000 kilos of cocaine at sea and transfers custody to Homeland Security Investigations for prosecution. At Dulles International Airport, near the nation's capital, U.S. Customs and Border Protection officers uncover weapons heading outbound during checks for unreported currency. In El Paso, CBP Agricultural Specialists inspect live and deceased animals to protect the U.S. from foreign diseases, like avian flu.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: From CIA wife to CIA spy: The widow of a CIA officer, who was killed in action, chooses to take up the mantle, becoming the first woman to go undercover in Moscow and handle one of the most important Russian sources of the Cold War.

programme.title: Airport Security: Brazil
programme.desc: Federal Police at Sao Paolo International Airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. Their main threat, cocaine smuggling. Agents arrest two different traffickers with bricks of cocaine branded in the same curious way. One of those loads is among the largest of the last few years. Panicked asylum seekers refuse to cooperate, causing an uproar. And suitcases carrying hundreds of counterfeit goods are intercepted.

programme.title: Lost Continent of the Pacific
programme.desc: Legends of lost civilizations have captivated people throughout time. During the Age of Discovery, explorers searched the Pacific in vain for a mysterious land they called "terra incognita" or "unknown land." programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot takes a break from the rigors of the trapline and gets busy preparing for another summer hunting season, horseback- style. Matty "forges" ahead with another big backwoods project and takes on some even bigger life changes. Billy attempts to rehabilitate a forgotten old friend to help him embark on a new adventure, and, despite a recent dump of spring snow, Emilie and Gilbert lay the groundwork for a little bit of backcountry luxury.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot takes advantage of the milder Yukon weather and tries her hand at a few new wilderness DIY projects; In the hopes of making his life in the bush "easier" - Matty digs deep - and searches for a less labor-intensive source of water. To accommodate the arrival of a few "four-legged" friends, Billy works on upgrading his backwoods property; And Emilie and Gilbert head into the wilds of Ontario - on the hunt for a source of spring-time sustenance.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: A new plane park has been created to house a fleet of Boeing 777s during the airport's 80 day, billion dollar runway upgrade project, but there is a massive slope to get in and out of it. Pushback Operator Mark Dearden's skills are put to the test as he finds out if he can tow a 300 ton plane down the entry slope without careering out of control. Customs Officers find five huge packages hidden in the bottom of a passenger's luggage. If the powder inside tests positive for heroin, it'll be the biggest drugs haul at the airport in 10 years. And Line Maintenance Engineer Andy Tetley is called onto a plane with a defunct air conditioning system and a temperature of over 110 degrees. He has only a few hours to find out what is wrong and cool it down before it's due to take off.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: More than a million passengers pass through Dubai International Airport every week. Behind the scenes 60,000 people from across the globe are hard at work. From ensuring the safety of the runway surface to dealing with drunken passengers, this episode of "Ultimate Airport" offers a rare chance to get to know the unsung men and women carrying out the often overlooked but vital tasks that make this multi-billion dollar airport run smoothly.

programme.title: Lost Continent of the Pacific
programme.desc: Legends of lost civilizations have captivated people throughout time. During the Age of Discovery, explorers searched the Pacific in vain for a mysterious land they called "terra incognita" or "unknown land." To this day, the elders on Easter Island claim their ancestors came from a continent called Hiva, believed to have sunk after a great disaster. Now, new scientific evidence points to a remote island chain in Polynesia as the center of an ancient, thriving civilization. For over 400 years these islands have been known as the Marquesas Archipelago, but before that the native Polynesians called them simply "The Isles of Hiva". Using new archeological and geological evidence together with oral tradition and voyaging techniques passed down for centuries, we are unveiling The Lost Continent Of The Pacific: a world of water and exploration, of human sacrifice and epic voyagers who had settled the largest ocean on Earth centuries before Columbus reached America.

programme.title: Atlantis Rising
programme.desc: Executive Produced by James Cameron, "Atlantis Discovered" is a 1x120 detective thriller that seeks out, uncovers and explores artifacts such as archaeological finds, satellite photographs, manuscripts hiding in plain sight, underwater exploration, etc. and attempt to "decode" the artifacts as springboards to further the investigation to get to the bottom of the story.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: Nature's Glow
programme.desc: Dive into a world where science feels like magic. Nearly a third of deep-sea species glow. Uncover the brilliant science behind bioluminescence. From inky oceans to sparkling glowworm caves and firefly forests, meet creatures that defy our imaginations. By using nature's original language of light, many creatures use their glow to hunt, hide, communicate and even deceive. Along the way, leading scientists reshape technology, health and the story of life on Earth.

programme.title: Sharks of Lost Island
programme.desc: A team of highly motivated scientists led by National Geographic Explorer-in-Residence Enric Sala sets out on a treacherous journey to the Pitcairn Islands, a remote archipelago in the Pacific Ocean, to document the environment both in the sea and on land with hopes of turning this potentially pristine ocean environment into a protected marine reserve. For thirty days and thirty nights, hundreds of miles from anywhere, Sala's expedition will tackle the mysteries of the Pitcairns head on, hitting all four islands in the chain. Not much is known about the islands and each tells a unique story. Following in the same vein as his previous odysseys (and films), Enric Sala leads the charge on yet another groundbreaking expedition to document what healthy reefs should look like and explore what could be one of the last pristine ocean locations on earth. This is exploration at its most extreme and isolated. And in this remote corner of the planet, the stakes are high.

programme.title: Shark island
programme.desc: The hidden destruction and dangers of over-fishing explored in this National Geographic documentary series where an ace team of marine divers captained by Enric Sala dive for the very first time in the protected waters of the Cocos National Park off the coast of Costa Rica. And here in a bid to untangle tuna, shark and turtles caught up in the lines and tackle left behind by irresponsible man.

programme.title: Pristine Seas
programme.desc: Follow National Geographic Explorer, Enric Sala, and his Pristine Seas project as they travel the globe to save our oceans.

programme.title: Super Reefs
programme.desc: In 2009, National Geographic Pristine Seas explored the southern Line Islands and found pristine coral reefs, thriving ecosystems teeming with sharks and huge schools of fish. But in 2015-16, an unprecedented ocean warming event killed half of the corals. The Pristine Seas team returned in 2021, hoping to see some signs of recovery. What they found instead was the most spectacular recovery of coral reefs ever witnessed.

programme.title: Shark island
programme.desc: The hidden destruction and dangers of over-fishing explored in this National Geographic documentary series where an ace team of marine divers captained by Enric Sala dive for the very first time in the protected waters of the Cocos National Park off the coast of Costa Rica. And here in a bid to untangle tuna, shark and turtles caught up in the lines and tackle left behind by irresponsible man.

programme.title: Untamed Philippines
programme.desc: We start on the tiny island of Batan, meeting a unique viper and a ubiquitous but also giant, land crab. Luzon is the main island of the Philippines. We drop in to Mindoro to see the most endangered large mammal in the Philippines, the tamaraw.

programme.title: Pristine Seas
programme.desc: Follow National Geographic Explorer, Enric Sala, and his Pristine Seas project as they travel the globe to save our oceans.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The long-awaited spinoff of the legendary The Incredible Dr. Pol franchise has finally hatched! Spearheaded by Dr. Pol and his son Charles, the Pol familys three generations are all joining forces to grow their animal loving empire and take on an ambitious new project: transforming 350-acres of undeveloped land into a fully functional family farm!

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: After getting the tractor stuck in mud, Charles and Ben need a quick solution to plant hayseed in their field to provide food for their incoming animals. The Pol family must quickly figure out why their field is so wet even though it hasnt rained in days. Meanwhile, Dr. Pol helps Charles and Beth set up their first beehive colonies on the new farm.

programme.title: Australia's Land of the Ancients
programme.desc: Australias Land of the Ancients explores the unique and ancient landscape of northeastern Australia, the most biodiverse region on the continent. From Crocodiles lying in wait for fish and hunting feral pigs to caring marsupial mothers of the far north, the film highlights some of the incredible species as they struggle to survive in their harsh environment amid a changing landscape.

programme.title: Alaska's Deadliest: Predator Prowl
programme.desc: North America doesn't get much colder, nor any darker than Alaska in winter. It's not a place you mess with, unless you've got a wild side. As winter breaks, carnivores emerge on Alaska's wide-open spaces, leaving prey animals no place to hide. Wolves chase caribou with ferocious intensity, brown bears battle for rights to a buffet and wolverines make short work of prey 100 times their size. Alaska's deadliest thrive in one of America's last wild frontiers.

programme.title: Winter's Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: Winter pushes wildlife to the extreme. For some, it is a chance to thrive; for others, the only way to escape the icy hold of winter is to shut down every physical system. When spring finally comes, it is a time for celebration for those who managed to survive the most brutal of seasons.

programme.title: Australia's Land of the Ancients
programme.desc: Australias Land of the Ancients explores the unique and ancient landscape of northeastern Australia, the most biodiverse region on the continent. From Crocodiles lying in wait for fish and hunting feral pigs to caring marsupial mothers of the far north, the film highlights some of the incredible species as they struggle to survive in their harsh environment amid a changing landscape.

programme.title: Alaska's Deadliest: Predator Prowl
programme.desc: North America doesn't get much colder, nor any darker than Alaska in winter. It's not a place you mess with, unless you've got a wild side. Alaska's deadliest thrive in one of America's last wild frontiers.

programme.title: Alaska's Deadliest: Predator Prowl
programme.desc: The biggest state in the union is also home to some of the deadliest predators. Alaska is one of the few remaining true wildernesses left on the planet. With its harsh environment, extreme cold and constant winter darkness it is not a place for the fainthearted. As springtime buds and the sun raises its head above the horizon, the state's predatory carnivores emerge on to the vast landscapes to hunt for food, with wolves, brown bears and wolverines dispatching prey with ease. In the waters along the coastline, giant orcas and salmon sharks track and kill their quarry while tiny terrors hide in the channels and make good use of their venomous attacks.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: A forensic look at how polar bears hunt prey, offering new perspectives on the tactics they use to track, stalk and ambush seals, whales and walruses. We follow a mother fighting to feed her two cubs in the harsh polar extremes, and a young male driven by starvation to tackle enormous prey.

programme.title: Winter's Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: Winter pushes wildlife to the extreme. For some, it is a chance to thrive; for others, the only way to escape the icy hold of winter is to shut down every physical system. When spring finally comes, it is a time for celebration for those who managed to survive the most brutal of seasons.

When spring finally comes, it is a time for celebration for those who managed to survive the most brutal of seasons.

programme.title: The World's Most Famous Tiger
programme.desc: Known as the Queen of Ranthambore, Machli is the most famous tiger in the world. The legendary tigress is a fearsome warrior known for her daring exploits. And she's the mother of an incredible four litters of cubs.

programme.title: Australia's Land of the Ancients
programme.desc: Australias Land of the Ancients explores the unique and ancient landscape of northeastern Australia, the most biodiverse region on the continent. From Crocodiles lying in wait for fish and hunting feral pigs to caring marsupial mothers of the far north, the film highlights some of the incredible species as they struggle to survive in their harsh environment amid a changing landscape.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: Heartland Docs
programme.desc: In picturesque rural Nebraska, husband and wife veterinary team Drs. Ben and Erin Schroeder live and work at the center of America's food chain, where the livelihoods of Midwestern farmers connect to families nationwide. Along with their two sons, Charlie and Chase, the Schroeder family is always on the go as their veterinary practice cares for the region's many animals in need. From winter blizzards to spring tornadoes and blistering summer heat waves, Drs. Ben and Erin overcome the obstacles with skill and heart.

In the waters along the coastline, giant orcas and salmon sharks track and kill their quarry while tiny terrors hide in the channels and make good use of their venomous attacks.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: It's summer in Michigan, which means time to bale some hay! It's a grueling process, but Dr. Pol, Charles, and Ben manage to mow their hayfield, which is the first step in baling. But a surprise rainstorm could ruin this year's hay haul. They hope for sun, so their crop doesn't spoil before they can bale. Meanwhile, the Pol's bring in their next animal to the farm - an emu!

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: It's the county fair season! The Pol's plan to get at least two cows and six sheep at the auction, but they have a lot to do before that can happen. First up, they must install a new perimeter fence. Charles and Ben think they are off to a good start, but when Dr. Pol points out how sneaky sheep can be, their workload doubles. Meanwhile, Beth is hoping for a goat at the small animal auction.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Examine the weirdest animals that hide deep beneath the soil's surface. A worm explodes from the seabed to yank fish into its mucky pit; a beetle tunnels deep into warm, wet dung; and a miniature digger excavates miles of tunnel with its teeth! Some hunt in swarms to overwhelm living prey, while solo operators rely on disguise and trickery to trap victims. Tunnellers display bizarre and ingenious solutions to survive in cramped, stuffy and dark conditions.

programme.title: Planet Carnivore: Perfect Killers
programme.desc: Great white sharks, polar bears, lions and brown bears battle rivals and the elements to maintain their positions at the top of the food chain.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Animal Faces
programme.desc: Majestic animals we deem beautiful are well documented. Their stories are celebrated while we appropriate their regality, elegance and grace to adorn our company logos, be our sporting mascots and represent our families on crests. Then there's the other animals, the aesthetic outsiders we don't consider cute or cuddly. The critters we tend to laugh at or revile simply because they don't fit into what we deem as beautiful. The animals selected by natural selection to be beaten with the ugly stick. This is the time for the World's Weirdest Animal Faces to shine! A celebration of respectable irreverence, revealing the extraordinarily weird features these creatures possess.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. programme.title: Planet Carnivore: Perfect Killers

programme.title: World's Deadliest Whale
programme.desc: Intelligent, cultured and deadly, the killer whale dominates every ocean on earth and as our planet changes, this top predator changes with it. They are elite, marine hunters with an extremely diverse diet including other apex predators like the great white shark. Killer whales pursue their prey like a pack of wolves and have multiple killing techniques.

programme.title: Jaguar: Jungle Icon of Guyana
programme.desc: A young jaguar is about to embark on the most important mission of his life, : to strike out and find a kingdom of his own. His journey will take him through varied habitats, each with its own cast of animals. Only if he can prove his worth will the jaguar be able to claim his throne in one of the last truly wild paradises on the planet.
